description:
A 7d KGS didnt find the solution in a 10 second blitz - can you do find it with an unlimited time? :)
!! Be careful about kos - consider the rest of the board to be a common middle game. That means you have +- same number of ko threats as your opponent and if you start an unnecessary ko you will lose many points - let's say 30 !!
